title: A key intersection near Micron project is getting urgent upgrades
summary: Clay, NY is undertaking urgent infrastructure upgrades at a key intersection near Micron Technology's semiconductor manufacturing facility construction site. The project addresses traffic and safety needs generated by the major economic development initiative.

political_signal.description: Intersection upgrades signal municipal responsiveness to infrastructure demands created by major private sector investment (Micron facility). Demonstrates proactive support for economic development project.
